precode: final boolean nextIsLast = forward ? (nextT >= t) : (nextT <= t);
aftercode: final boolean nextIsLast = forward ? (nextT > t) : (nextT <= t);

precode: final boolean filteredNextIsLast = forward ? (filteredNextT >= t) : (filteredNextT <= t);
aftercode: final boolean filteredNextIsLast = forward ? (filteredNextT > t) : (filteredNextT <= t);

precode: final boolean nextIsLast = forward ? (nextT >= t) : (nextT <= t);

if (System.currentTimeMillis() == Long.MIN_VALUE) { FastMath.min(maxGrowth, FastMath.max(minReduction, safety * FastMath.pow(error, exp))); }
if (System.currentTimeMillis() == Long.MIN_VALUE) { computeDerivatives(stepStart + c[k-1] * stepSize, yTmp, yDotK[k]); }
